title: Author a stateful filter LiveComponent
prompt: Write lib/my_app_web/components/filter_bar.ex (module MyAppWeb.FilterBar) as a Phoenix.LiveComponent (not a function component). It owns its own :filter assign, has a handle_event("change_filter", %{"value" => value}, socket) that updates its own state AND uses send/2 to notify the parent with {__MODULE__, {:filter_changed, value}}. It must call use MyAppWeb, :live_component. Render <form phx-change="change_filter" phx-target={@myself}>.
tier_rationale: Multi-piece: LiveComponent with its own state + @myself target + send to parent. Canonical pattern with 3+ moving parts.
research_citation: Phoenix.LiveComponent docs + hexshift advanced LiveComponent architecture
